name: slack-mcp-pipelinehealth-new
description: MCI Pipeline Intelligence Agent for Slack — real-time health monitoring, auto-repair, token re-auth, morning summaries, interactive Home Tab, AI canvas Q&A, and visualisation canvas

scripts.morning-summary: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {WebClient}=require('@slack/web-api'); const s=require('./src/services/scheduler'); s.postMorningSummary(new WebClient(process.env.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN));"
